title: A Dark Legend Takes Shape
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Nami, Unknown person #9 as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: All Warships at the Northeast Coast have--!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get away from the Island!! All ships pull back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who is responsible?! This unforgettable act must be punished!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Or you'll all be put to death!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I couldn't even save one tiny baby!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Vait, Kuma!! Give it a rest!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would be too risky to keep tryingk to save people!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There might still be more people out there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ASSHOLE!! You'll never make it off this island alive, y'hear?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: JIHA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No one gets the drop on me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We can't!! The forest's on fire!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
